description: A technician needs to build a complex wiring harness that connects the satellite's main computer to its various subsystems.

nodes.task_description: Follow the wiring diagram to cut, strip, and crimp pins onto all the necessary wires.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly prepares all wires according to the schematic.

nodes.task_description: Insert the pinned wires into the correct locations in the multi-pin connectors.

expected_outcome.value: Agent populates the connectors with 100% accuracy.

nodes.task_description: Perform a continuity test on the completed harness to ensure there are no open circuits or short circuits.

expected_outcome.value: Agent runs the test and confirms the harness passes all continuity checks.
